title: The Value of Time
overview: Alfredo Méndez, 40, keeps his wife's cryogenically preserved corpse in his country house. This unusual behavior stems from his love for her and his medical ambition. However, in recent years his health has been declining, forcing him to seek the care of Corona, a young nurse who also serves as a maid.
